name: landAt

ret.desc: Returns [[true]] if landing command was processed successfully, [[false]] if failed.

Item.desc: a helipad object of helipad type (can be an invisible helipad) or [[PositionWorld]] to land at.
Item.name: position

Item.desc: one of "None", "Get In", "Get Out", "Land" and since {{GVI|arma3|2.20|size= 0.75}} also "GetIn", "GetOut".
Item.name: mode

Item.desc: (Optional) (Helicopter type only) time to wait after touch down in "GetIn"/"GetOut" mode before taking off to the next waypoint. Default: -1.
Item.name: waitTime

Item.desc: (Optional) when true, the given land position will be adjusted to the nearest surface underneath. Default: [[false]].
Item.name: putOnSurface

ArraySized.desc: (Helicopter type only) before heli is landed - wait time set for "GetIn"/"GetOut" mode, after heli is landed - remaining time before take off to the next waypoint or -1.
ArraySized.name: waitTime
